shelfmark: P. Washington Libr. of Congress Inv. Ar. Paper 63
description: State document, probably late Fatimid or Ayyubid. ʿAlī b. Aḥmad the miller reports to a wazir (name unattested) about the dilapidated condition of the masjid al-zimām. The condition has worsened to an extent that one of the floors is about to collapse. He asks that a rescript (tawqīʿ bi-amr) be issued for ʿAlī b. Sālim so that the masjid can be restored to its former glory. The masjid is known today as Masjid Muḥammad al-Ṣaghīr and it is presumably where Muḥammad b. Abī Bakr is buried. YU
